newsSince: No material news since June 9. FY ended Mar-2026 showed higher sales (¥200.8B) but lower net income (¥8.7B); FY2027 guidance modest (¥215B sales). The key catalyst — the March 2026 Arm Total Design / TSMC partnership for AI-datacenter custom accelerators and server CPUs — predates the window.

sources.label: Socionext FY2026 results / FY2027 guidance (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: custom ASIC / SerDes IP / chiplets with Arm Total Design + TSMC for AI-datacenter accelerators sits closer to the 2027 compute bottleneck than rank 32 implies — consistent with prior June 9 'up' call. No new catalyst in window and net income fell YoY, so only a modest +1.
verdicts.bull: Custom AI silicon, SerDes IP and Arm/TSMC datacenter-accelerator partnership give direct scale-up-fabric / chiplet exposure.
verdicts.neutral: Evidence mostly category-level; FY2027 guidance unexciting; +15% YTD already reflects some optimism.
verdicts.bear: FY2026 net income fell YoY; design-win revenue lumpy; less direct than HBM/advanced-packaging names.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Custom AI-accelerator/server-CPU design-win disclosures via Arm Total Design.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Lumpy ASIC ramp; margin pressure as net income already declined.
